title: codengine project manifest
description: Declares where a project's workflows and task functions live, and in which language. Consumed by the CLI and the language server to resolve a task's module to concrete source + a runner/analyzer. Version 1.

workflows.description: Glob pattern(s) matching the workflow diagrams, relative to the manifest or absolute (e.g. "workflows/**/*.yuml"). All matched workflows are loaded together as one registry.

modules.description: Namespace -> module config. The empty key "" is the default module (tasks with module: null).

transport.description: How the orchestrator reaches the module: "local" (default) runs a worker/in-process; "remote" calls a worker already running at `url`.

url.description: For transport "remote": the running worker's base URL. The service owns its own code, so `functions`/`root` are not sent to it.

functions.description: Glob pattern(s) for the functions source, resolved against the root or the manifest dir. Required for a local module; ignored for a remote one.

root.description: The module's project root (its dependency environment), relative to the manifest or absolute. Auto-detected when omitted. Local only.

python.description: Python interpreter for language "py" (must have codengine-runner / codengine-worker available).
